summary: Read-only independent reviewer assessment of lifecycle and sync-safety completion condition coverage from the prompt-provided project memory summary and plan snippets.
decisions: Verdict: AGREE. The described plan covers lifecycle completion via pre-response memory, task lifecycle fail conditions, finish traces, reviewed growth, behavior recall, recovery, and verify:goal coverage.

Verdict: AGREE. The described plan covers sync-safety completion via git_sync dry-run classification, bounded auto_sync controls, allowed paths, sensitivity and path-policy checks, provenance, and public data safety blocks.
